name: Express Monorepo Noisy
description: Workspace-style monorepo with generated files and insecure-looking docs. The only confirmed finding should be a command injection sink in the admin job runner.

expected_findings.description: Admin job runner shells out with untrusted input from req.body.name.

negative_controls.description: Admin export route uses custom authn/authz middleware and should stay clean.
Search route uses parameterized SQL and should stay clean.
Generated client code should not become a confirmed finding.
Documentation examples should not become confirmed findings.
